rules.name: fault-vibration-temperature
rules.message: Vibration combined with temperature rise requires shutdown and human approval before restart.

rules.name: fault-sensor-alarm
rules.message: Sensor anomalies require calibration cross-check before the diagnosis can be closed.

rules.name: process-heat-deviation
rules.message: Thermal process deviation requires batch hold and process engineering review.

rules.name: process-torque-window
rules.message: Tooling or torque deviation requires verification against the approved process card.

rules.name: quality-critical-dimension
rules.message: Critical dimension defects require lot quarantine and MRB review.

rules.name: quality-surface-defect
rules.message: Surface defects require repeat inspection and traceability verification.
